data.title: Add no_new_tests_needed exit path and shared standard consumption to red-test-writer agent
data.description:
## Description

Update the red-test-writer agent prompt to add the no_new_tests_needed exit path and consume the shared behavioral testing standard.

### Steps
1. Add decision gate at the top of Section 3 (Process) in `plugins/dso/agents/red-test-writer.md`:
   - If the task description contains `## Testing Mode\nGREEN` → emit TEST_RESULT:no_new_tests_needed with REASON:green_classified immediately. Do not attempt to write a test.
2. Add coverage check (rule 1 from shared standard):
   - Before writing a new test, check existing test coverage for the behavior being tested
   - If existing tests already exercise the behavior with correct assertions → emit TEST_RESULT:no_new_tests_needed with REASON:existing_coverage_sufficient
   - Include EXISTING_TESTS field listing the test file paths that provide coverage
3. Add reference to the shared behavioral testing standard:
   - Add consumption point in Section 2 or 3: "Consult plugins/dso/skills/shared/prompts/behavioral-testing-standard.md for the 4-rule behavioral testing standard"
   - Note: the standard file is created by a sibling story (4095-e3d9). If the file does not yet exist, reference it as a future consumption point — the exit path logic operates independently.
4. Remove `.test-index` RED marker added by the RED test task

### File Impact
- `plugins/dso/agents/red-test-writer.md` — Edit
- `.test-index` — Edit (remove RED marker)

## Testing Mode
UPDATE

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] `bash tests/run-all.sh` passes (exit 0)
  Verify: bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] Agent prompt contains no_new_tests_needed exit path
  Verify: grep -q "no_new_tests_needed" plugins/dso/agents/red-test-writer.md
- [ ] Agent prompt contains green_classified decision gate
  Verify: grep -q "green_classified" plugins/dso/agents/red-test-writer.md
- [ ] Agent prompt references shared behavioral testing standard
  Verify: grep -q "behavioral-testing-standard" plugins/dso/agents/red-test-writer.md
- [ ] RED marker removed from .test-index
  Verify: { grep -q "\[no_new_tests" .test-index; test $? -ne 0; }
